title: Sign in with valid credentials and reach authenticated area
description: Verifies an existing user can sign in with email/password and is redirected to an authenticated destination based on onboarding state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard or the company onboarding step

title: Access gating redirects unauthenticated user away from subscription page
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated visitor attempting to access subscription management is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Complete onboarding and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a new authenticated user can complete the company, domain, and employees onboarding steps and is redirected to the dashboard at the end.

steps.description: Fill PackIQ Test Co into the company name field
Fill Test company description for onboarding into the company description field
Advance to the next onboarding step
Select a valid industry or domain option
Advance to the next onboarding step
Select a valid employee count range
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Add a new product and see it in the table
description: Verifies a user can create a product with valid details and the new product appears in the products table.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Products
Fill Product A into the product name field
Fill SKU-A-001 into the SKU field
Fill valid values into the dimensions fields
Fill a valid value into the weight field
Verify the products table contains a row for SKU-A-001

title: Create a new account and start onboarding
description: Verifies a new user can register with a valid email and password and is redirected into onboarding.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with test.user+signup@packiq.example
Fill in the password field with a strong password value
Verify the user lands on the company onboarding step

title: Upload valid CSV and preview parsed rows
description: Verifies an authenticated user can upload a valid CSV file and see the parsed data previewed in a table.

steps.description: Upload a valid CSV file with required columns
Verify a preview table of parsed CSV rows is displayed

title: Open results table
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Results and see the results table rendered.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Results
Verify an optimization results table is displayed

title: View dashboard overview metrics and recent optimizations
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the dashboard overview and see key metric cards and recent optimization history.

steps.description: Verify dashboard metric cards are displayed
Verify the recent optimization results table is displayed

title: View products list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Products and see a products table rendered.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Products
Verify a products table is displayed

title: Update company profile and notification preferences
description: Verifies that a user can edit company name/description, change notification preferences, save, and see a confirmation that changes were saved.

steps.description: Fill PackIQ Test Company into the company name field
Fill Updated company description for UI test into the company description field
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated company name is displayed in the company name field

title: Delete a product and verify it is removed
description: Verifies a user can delete an existing product after confirming and it no longer appears in the products table.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Products
Fill Product To Delete into the product name field
Fill SKU-DEL-001 into the SKU field
Fill valid values into the dimensions fields
Fill a valid value into the weight field
Initiate delete for the product with SKU-DEL-001
Verify the products table does not contain a row for SKU-DEL-001

title: Save company profile information in onboarding company step
description: Verifies an authenticated user can enter company profile details and proceed to the domain step successfully.

steps.description: Fill PackIQ Onboarding Co into the company name field
Fill Company description used for onboarding step validation into the company description field
Advance to the next onboarding step
Verify the domain onboarding step is displayed

title: Create a new order and see it in the list
description: User can create a new order by providing required fields and the new order appears in the orders list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the orders page
Fill valid values into all required order fields
Verify the new order appears in the orders list

title: Select domain and proceed to employees step
description: Verifies an authenticated user can choose an industry/domain and advance to the employees onboarding step.

steps.description: Select a valid industry or domain option
Advance to the next onboarding step
Verify the employees onboarding step is displayed

title: Filter results and export CSV
description: Verifies a user can apply a filter to results and export a CSV for the filtered set.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Results
Verify an export CSV output is presented in the UI

title: View current subscription plan and status
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open subscription management and see the current plan and status.

steps.description: Verify current subscription plan information is displayed
Verify subscription status information is displayed

title: View analytics charts
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Analytics and see key charts rendered.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Analytics

title: View orders list with status indicators
description: User can open Orders and see a list of orders rendered with status information.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the orders page
Verify a list of orders is displayed with status indicators

title: Navigate from dashboard to products using sidebar
description: Verifies an authenticated user can use the dashboard sidebar to navigate to the products section.

steps.description: Click the sidebar navigation item for products
Verify the products page is displayed

title: Show error for invalid login credentials
description: Verifies the login form rejects incorrect credentials and shows an inline error to the user without logging them in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Verify an invalid-credentials error is displayed

title: Expand AI reasoning for a result
description: Verifies a user can expand a result row to view AI reasoning details for the recommendation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Results
Expand AI reasoning for the first result row
Verify AI reasoning details are displayed for the expanded result

title: Add a catalog box to a product
description: User can add a selected catalog box to a chosen product and see confirmation in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the box catalog page
Open a box item from the catalog
Start the add-to-product action for this box
Select an existing product from the product selector
Confirm adding the box to the product
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating the box was added to the product

title: View current company settings
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open settings and see current company profile fields and notification preferences loaded.

steps.description: Verify company profile fields are displayed with existing values
Verify notification preference toggles are displayed

title: Filter orders by status
description: User can filter the orders list by a status and only matching orders remain visible.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the orders page
Select a specific status in the status filter
Verify the displayed orders are filtered to the selected status

title: Show CSV format validation error for missing required columns
description: Verifies the upload preview blocks invalid CSVs missing required columns and shows a CSV format validation error.

steps.description: Upload a CSV file missing required columns
Verify a CSV format validation error is visible
Verify the preview table is not displayed

title: Prevent saving a product with missing required fields
description: Verifies the add product form blocks submission when required fields are empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Products
Fill SKU-MISS-001 into the SKU field
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Look up a shipment and view status timeline
description: User can enter a tracking number, run a lookup, and see the shipment timeline and status steps.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the shipment tracking page
Fill a valid tracking number into the tracking number field
Verify a shipment status timeline with steps is displayed

title: Require company name before proceeding from onboarding company step
description: Verifies the onboarding flow blocks advancing when the company name is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill  into the company name field
Fill Description without a name into the company description field
Advance to the next onboarding step
Verify a company name validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the company onboarding step

title: Update analytics with date range filter
description: Verifies selecting a date range updates the analytics visualizations to reflect the selected range.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Analytics
Select a valid date range in the date range filter
Verify the analytics charts update to reflect the selected date range

title: View box catalog grid
description: User can open the Box Catalog and see a grid/list of available box sizes.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the box catalog page
Verify a grid or list of catalog boxes is displayed

title: Require employee count selection before completing onboarding
description: Verifies the onboarding flow blocks completion when employee count is not selected and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Verify an employee count validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the employees onboarding step

title: Saved settings persist after page reload
description: Verifies that settings changes persist by reloading the settings page and observing previously saved values.

steps.description: Fill PackIQ Persist Test into the company name field
Verify the updated company name is displayed in the company name field

title: Open an order to view its details
description: User can open an order from the list and see a details view for that order.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the orders page
Click an order row in the list
Verify an order details view is displayed

title: Require domain selection before proceeding from onboarding domain step
description: Verifies the onboarding flow blocks advancing when no domain is selected and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Advance to the next onboarding step
Verify a domain selection validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the domain onboarding step

title: View billing history table
description: Verifies that a user can view billing history entries including invoice date and amount in the billing history table.

steps.description: Verify a billing history table is displayed
Verify at least one billing history row shows an invoice date and amount, or an empty state is displayed when no invoices exist

title: Validate required fields when creating an order
description: When required fields are missing, the order cannot be created and validation feedback is shown.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the orders page
Submit the new order without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Show validation errors for invalid signup inputs
description: Verifies signup prevents submission with invalid email and/or weak password and shows validation feedback to the user.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with a weak password value
Verify validation errors are displayed for the email and/or password fields

title: Prevent running optimization before a CSV is uploaded
description: Verifies the user cannot start optimization without providing input data and is shown an actionable validation prompt.

steps.description: Verify an upload-required validation prompt is visible

title: Cancel product deletion keeps the product
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation leaves the product in the table.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to Products
Fill Product Keep into the product name field
Fill SKU-KEEP-001 into the SKU field
Fill valid values into the dimensions fields
Fill a valid value into the weight field
Initiate delete for the product with SKU-KEEP-001
Verify the products table contains a row for SKU-KEEP-001

title: Look up a shipment and view estimated delivery date
description: User can run a tracking lookup and see an estimated delivery date when available.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the shipment tracking page
Fill a valid tracking number into the tracking number field
Verify an estimated delivery date is displayed

title: Prevent saving when required company fields are empty
description: Verifies that clearing required company profile fields blocks saving and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill  into the company name field
Verify a field validation error is visible

title: Filter box catalog by dimension range
description: User can apply a dimension range filter in the Box Catalog and the displayed boxes update accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the box catalog page
Fill a valid minimum value into the dimension range filter
Fill a valid maximum value into the dimension range filter
Verify the catalog box list is filtered by the selected dimension range

title: Navigate from landing to signup
description: Verifies a prospective visitor can use the Get Started call-to-action to reach the signup page.

steps.description: Click the call-to-action to get started
Verify the user lands on the signup page

title: View box details such as price and volume
description: User can open a box item in the catalog and see its key details like price and volume.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the box catalog page
Open a box item from the catalog
Verify box details including price and volume information are displayed

title: Navigate from login to signup
description: Verifies a prospective user can navigate from the login page to the signup page to create an account.

steps.description: Click the link to create an account
Verify the user lands on the signup page

title: Prevent tracking lookup when tracking number is empty
description: User cannot submit a shipment tracking lookup without a tracking number and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the shipment tracking page
Submit the tracking lookup with an empty tracking number field
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for the tracking number

title: Navigate from landing to login
description: Verifies a prospective visitor can use the login entry point on the landing page to reach the login page.

steps.description: Click the link to log in
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Display empty state on dashboard when no recent optimizations exist
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an empty state message for recent optimizations when none are available.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible for recent optimizations

title: Orders page empty state
description: If there are no orders, the user sees an empty state on the Orders page.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the orders page
If a status filter exists, select a status that yields no results
Verify an empty state is displayed for no matching orders

title: Clear previous shipment results when performing a new lookup
description: After viewing one shipment, entering a different tracking number and searching updates the displayed shipment information.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the shipment tracking page
Fill a valid tracking number into the tracking number field
Fill a different valid tracking number into the tracking number field
Verify the shipment tracking results reflect the most recent lookup
